Examples.Title: Get task detail
Examples.Description: Return details about a task. Consumers of this API should not expect updates more frequent than once every five seconds for a given task.
Examples.Code:
### Get task detail
GET {{host}}/v1/tasks/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
X-Runway-Version: 2024-11-06
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Success
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: The task does not exist, or was deleted or canceled.
# Content-Type: application/json
